enabled.description: Enables IdP-initiated login for this connection

client_id.description: Default application client_id user is redirected to after validated SAML response

client_authorizequery.description: Query string options to customize the behaviour for OpenID Connect when idpinitiated.client_protocol is oauth2. Allowed parameters: redirect_uri, scope, response_type. For example, redirect_uri=https://jwt.io&scope=openid email&response_type=token
